answer_assessments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
answer_assessments.text_excerpt: The hardest technical decision was implementing real-time communication for the live classes and student-teacher interaction. I had to choose between normal HTTPS request and web sockets. I select socket IO because it provides real-time two-way communication and it is more suitable for live chat and instant update. Although it was more complex to implement, it improved the user user experience by enabling real-time video setting and chat also.
